title: Loki and the Holy Knights — Chapter 1135
main_description: The Elbaf conflict sharpens around Loki, the God’s Knights, giant children, and the secrets of the island’s royal past. This chapter contains 4 structured story parts and 178 cleaned dialogue lines.
